args.query: SELECT issueid__c FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= '2022-08-16' AND createddate < '2023-01-17' AND (subject ILIKE '%AI Cirku-Tech%' OR description ILIKE '%AI Cirku-Tech%' OR subject ILIKE '%Cirku-Tech%' OR description ILIKE '%Cirku-Tech%');

exec_args.sql: SELECT issueid__c FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= '2022-08-16' AND createddate < '2023-01-17' AND (subject ILIKE '%AI Cirku-Tech%' OR description ILIKE '%AI Cirku-Tech%' OR subject ILIKE '%Cirku-Tech%' OR description ILIKE '%Cirku-Tech%');

args.query: SELECT issueid__c, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= '2022-08-16' AND createddate < '2023-01-17' AND (subject ILIKE '%AI Cirku-Tech%' OR description ILIKE '%AI Cirku-Tech%' OR subject ILIKE '%Cirku-Tech%' OR description ILIKE '%Cirku-Tech%') GROUP BY issueid__c ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1;
